repair.instruction: Remove the style attribute. Replace the style object with Tailwind utility classes on the design-system scale.
Import Button from "@/components/ui/button" and replace the raw <button> with <Button>. Use variant props (variant="default" | "outline" | "ghost" | "destructive") instead of color classes.

requiredActions: Remove the style attribute. Replace the style object with Tailwind utility classes on the design-system scale.
Import Button from "@/components/ui/button" and replace the raw <button> with <Button>. Use variant props (variant="default" | "outline" | "ghost" | "destructive") instead of color classes.
contracts.agentMessage:
SNAPLINE FOUND UI DRIFT

src/components/dashboard/onboarding-flow.tsx

2 violations:
- [error] inline style object: style={{ width: `${progress}%` }} (line 82)
- [error] raw <button> used while <Button> exists (line 123)

Repair:
- Remove the style attribute. Replace the style object with Tailwind utility classes on the design-system scale.
- Import Button from "@/components/ui/button" and replace the raw <button> with <Button>. Use variant props (variant="default" | "outline" | "ghost" | "destructive") instead of color classes.
